ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_label" TEXT /* Label for the size (e.g., P, S, M) */,
  "size_category" TEXT /* Category of size (e.g., Women's, Men's) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the size category */,
  "size_standard" TEXT /* Sizing standard (e.g., US, EU, UK) */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group (e.g., Adult, Child) */,
  "fit_type" TEXT /* Fit type (e.g., Regular, Slim, Relaxed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement detail */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID referencing the size in the sizes table */,
  "bust" TEXT /* Bust measurement for the size */,
  "waist" TEXT /* Waist measurement for the size */,
  "hip" INTEGER /* Hip measurement for the size */,
  "shoulder" TEXT /* Shoulder measurement for the size */,
  "sleeve_length" TEXT /* Sleeve length measurement for the size */,
  "inseam" TEXT /* Inseam measurement for the size */,
  "cuff_circumference" TEXT /* Cuff circumference for the size */,
  "chest_depth" TEXT /* Chest depth measurement for the size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_charts" (
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart */,
  "chart_label" TEXT /* Label for the size chart (e.g., Women's Tops) */,
  "size_category" TEXT /* Category for which the size chart applies */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand associated with the size chart */,
  "chart_type" TEXT /* Type of chart (e.g., Top, Bottom, Dress) */,
  "chart_image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the size chart */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_chart_measurements" (
  "chart_measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart measurement link */,
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* ID referencing the size chart */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID referencing the measurement details */,
  "chart_type_id" INTEGER /* ID referencing the chart type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_chart_measurements_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_chart_measurements_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "preferred_size" TEXT /* Preferred size of the customer */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the customer */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID referencing the customer providing the feedback */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID referencing the size being reviewed */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text feedback provided by the customer */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating provided by the customer (1-5 scale) */,
  "fit_satisfaction" TEXT /* Satisfaction level with the fit (e.g., Very Satisfied, Satisfied, Neutral, Dissatisfied, Very Dissatisfied) */,
  "sizing_accuracy" TEXT /* How accurately the size fits (e.g., Perfect, Good, Fair, Poor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID referencing the customer who initiated the return */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Order ID associated with the return */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID referencing the size of the item returned */,
  "return_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date when the return was initiated */,
  "fit_issue" TEXT /* Specific fit issue (e.g., Too Small, Too Large, Incorrect Length) */,
  "return_status" TEXT /* Status of the return (e.g., Processing, Completed, Canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend record */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID referencing the size related to the trend */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the trend is recorded */,
  "total_sales" INTEGER /* Total sales for that year by size */,
  "total_returns" INTEGER /* Total returns for that year by size */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season for which the trend is recorded (e.g., Spring, Summer, Fall, Winter) */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of trend (e.g., Sales, Returns, Feedback) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_trends_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the brand */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the brand was founded */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country where the brand originated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_lines" (
  "line_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product line */,
  "line_name" TEXT /* Name of the product line */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID referencing the brand associated with the product line */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product line (e.g., Tops, Bottoms, Dresses) */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the product line (e.g., Women, Men, Children) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("line_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_lines_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID referencing the customer who made the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount for the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., Credit Card, PayPal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Admin, User) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for user login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Password hash for authentication */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID referencing the user's role */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
